_source: Hand-written sample prompts in the spirit of Google IFEval (Zhou et al., 2023). For the full benchmark (~541 prompts, 25 rule families), download from https://huggingface.co/datasets/google/IFEval and convert each `instruction_id_list` + `kwargs` entry into the `rules` schema below. The full ruleset and reference checkers live in https://github.com/google-research/google-research/tree/master/instruction_following_eval.
_license_note: Hand-written placeholder prompts for the smoke / scaffold test only.

items.prompt: Return a JSON object with a single key 'answer' whose value is the string 'yes'. Output only the JSON, nothing else.
Write exactly three sentences about a cat.
Describe a sunny day without using the letter 'e' anywhere in your response.
